nasb.text: Do not be as the horse or as the mule which have no understanding, Whose trappings include bit and bridle to hold them in check, Otherwise they will not come near to you.

esv.text: Be not like a horse or a mule, without understanding, which must be curbed with bit and bridle, or it will not stay near you.

cnv.text: 你不可像無知的騾馬， 如果不用嚼環轡頭勒住牠們， 牠們就不肯走近。

ccb.text: 不要像无知的骡马， 不用嚼环辔头就不驯服。”

csbs.text: 你不要像没有悟性的骡马， 如果不用嚼环和辔头勒住， 它就不肯靠近你。
